prompt: (9:16) Raw high-fidelity photo, eye-level, medium shot, iPhone 17 Pro sim, 35mm, f/4, sharp subject, natural depth, authentic grain. Framing: Subject ~60%, ~2m, centered, mirrored wall + plants, terrazzo floor.
